summary: Created calendar_scheduler.py core sync logic with full meeting link detection (Zoom, Google Meet, Teams, Webex), skip marker support ([NR], [SKIP], [NO RECORD]), deduplication via iCalUID-based event keys, orphaned bot cleanup for cancelled/deleted events, and join time calculation respecting Recall's 10+ minute minimum requirement. All 6 test suites pass (22/22 individual tests).
learnings: The existing calendar_scheduler.py file used a different architecture (SQLite database) than specified in brief (JSON state file). Overwrote to match brief requirements.
Test showed that link extraction requires full URL protocol (https://) - pattern matching needs to capture protocol prefix.
Join time calculation has timing edge cases - near-future events need adjustment to meet Recall's minimum 10-minute requirement.
Video link detection patterns work reliably across all major platforms (Zoom, Google Meet, Teams, Webex).
Skip markers work correctly in various title positions (beginning, middle, end).
